title: Review story-site architecture and maintainability
goal: Identify technical risks, structural weaknesses, and maintainability concerns before QA closeout.

steps.text: Review implemented story-site draft and handoff notes.
Assess structure, dependency boundaries, and responsiveness risks.
Classify findings by severity and block on high-risk issues.

acceptanceCriteria: Architecture findings are explicit and severity-tagged
High-risk issues are identified before QA sign-off

verification.text: Confirm all high-severity architecture findings have clear remediation path
